title: liparis benguetensis
intro: Liparis benguetensis, also known as Benguet orchid, is a type of orchid native to the Philippines. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which contain flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins that have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Liparis benguetensis include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The herbal preparation of this plant typically involves drying the roots, which can then be used to make tea, decoctions, or infusions for medicinal purposes.
